app.name: Skill Desktop
app.description: Agent Skill management infrastructure for developers

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.subtitle: Press ? anytime to bring this up.

step1.title: Welcome to Skill Desktop
step1.description: Let's set up where your skills will live.
step1.crossToolHint: Cross-tool standard — Cursor, Codex, Gemini will see your skills automatically.
step1.philosophyHint: Your skills are just files. We index them in SQLite, but the file system is the source of truth — you own them, back them up, version them however you want.

step2.title: Which AI tools do you use?
step2.description: We'll auto-install new skills to the tools you pick. You can change this later in Settings.
step2.noneDetected: We couldn't detect any AI tool installations. You can still add skills to your library — they'll just need to be installed manually.
step2.noneInstalledTitle: No AI tool found on this machine yet
step2.noneInstalledHint: Tap “Install” next to a tool above to open its official setup guide in your browser. Come back here when it's installed and we'll pick it up automatically.
step2.crossToolFallback: You can also skip this step — skills will still land in ~/.agents/skills/, which any tool that follows the Agent Skills standard can read.

step3.title: Try a sample skill
step3.description: Import this starter from Anthropic's official examples to see how skills work.
step3.skipped: No problem — you can browse examples anytime from the Home view.
step3.afterHint: Click "Get started" to start using Skill Desktop.

quickInstall.description: Pick which AI tools to install these into. They'll be symlinked, not copied.
quickInstall.descriptionDone: Your skills are ready to use in the selected AI tools.

home.tagline: Your skills, everywhere your AI is.
home.subtitle: Manage Agent Skills and install them into Claude, Cursor, Codex, Gemini — or any tool that follows the standard.

detectedTools.title: Detected AI tools
detectedTools.subtitle: Skills installed here will be picked up automatically.

recentSkills.title: Recently added
recentSkills.empty: No skills yet — import one above to get started.

updates.noSourceSkills: No remote skills to check yet — import a skill from GitHub or a URL first.
updates.expandHint: Tap the banner to review them

suggestion.description_one: Install it into {{tools}} with one click.
suggestion.description_other: Install them into {{tools}} with one click.

subtitle.aitools: Manage how skills reach your AI tools.

library.title: Library
library.noLibraryPathDesc: To get started, please select a directory where your skills will be stored.

batchInstall.description: Pick which AI tool to install every selected skill into. Skills are symlinked, not copied — they stay live with your library.
batchInstall.noTools: No AI tools detected on this machine. Onboarding will help you set one up.

addToSpace.title: Add to Space
addToSpace.description: Select a space to add {{count}} skill(s) to
addToSpace.noSpaces: No spaces available. Create a space first.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete {{count}} Skills
deleteConfirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} skill(s)? This action cannot be undone.

quarantineConfirm.title: Quarantine {{count}} Skills
quarantineConfirm.description: Move {{count}} skill(s) to the quarantine area. Quarantined skills are marked as potentially unstable or sensitive.

skillDetail.noSkillSelected: Select a skill to view details
skillDetail.author: Author
skillDetail.highRiskWarning: This skill requires high-risk permissions. Make sure you trust the source before enabling it.

run.noScripts: This skill has no scripts/ directory, so there's nothing to execute here.
run.highRiskHelp: Review the Security tab before running. Continue?

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Skill
deleteConfirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

updateConfirm.title: Update Skill
updateConfirm.description: A new version of "{{name}}" is available. Do you want to update?

spaces.title: Workspaces
spaces.selectSpace: Select a space to view details

form.descriptionPlaceholder: A brief description of this workspace

sync.needActiveDir: Set an Active directory in the space settings to enable symlink sync.

cloneDialog.title: Clone Space
cloneDialog.description: Create a copy of "{{name}}" with the same skill visibility settings.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Space
deleteConfirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

installSkill.title: Install to AI tool
installSkill.description: Creates a symbolic link from this skill into the target tool's skills directory. The tool will discover the skill on next launch.

discover.title: Discover
discover.placeholder: Search Anthropic examples, MCP servers, registries…
discover.noResults: No matches yet. Try a broader search.

mcp.noToolsFound: No tools found on this server

warnings.setLibraryPath: Please set a library path in Settings first
warnings.verifySource: Please verify the source is trustworthy before importing

preview.title: Preview
preview.enterUrlToPreview: Enter a URL to preview the skill

dropZone.title: Drop folders or skill files here
dropZone.subtitle: Folders, .zip / .skill archives, or loose SKILL.md files

updates.title: Updates
updates.checkDesc: Compares each remote-sourced skill against its origin. {{count}} eligible.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Skill Desktop is designed to be navigable entirely from the keyboard. Press the key below to see every shortcut.
shortcuts.openOverlay: Show the full shortcuts cheat sheet

library.title: Library Settings
library.directoryDesc: Location where your skills are stored
library.rescanDesc: Manually rescan the library directory for changes
library.autoSyncDesc: Automatically update index when files change

security.title: Security
security.confirmDangerousDesc: Show confirmation before executing shell commands

llm.title: LLM Providers
llm.description: Configure LLM API providers for skill debugging and testing
llm.noProviders: No providers configured. Add one to get started.
llm.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this provider?

cli.title: CLI Tools
cli.description: Configure API keys and base URLs for AI coding CLI tools like Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Codex, and OpenCode
cli.noTools: No CLI tools configured. Add one to get started.
cli.exportAllDesc: Export all enabled CLI tool configurations as shell export commands
cli.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this CLI tool configuration?
cli.writeToShellConfigDesc: Automatically add environment variables to your shell configuration file

languageSelector.title: Select Language
languageSelector.description: Choose your preferred language for the application

riskAnalysis.title: Code Risk Analysis
riskAnalysis.codeWarning: This skill contains executable code. Review the detected risks carefully before enabling.

sandbox.selectSkillPrompt: Select a skill from the list to debug
sandbox.highRiskDescription: This skill requires high-risk permissions (shell_exec). Are you sure you want to execute it?
sandbox.noScriptsError: This skill has no scripts/ directory, so there is nothing to execute. Add an executable file under scripts/ in the skill to enable running it from the sandbox.
sandbox.selectScriptError: Select a script from the Scripts tab to execute.

createSkill.title: Create New Skill
createSkill.nameHint: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only (e.g., my-awesome-skill)
createSkill.nameTooLong: Skill name must be 64 characters or less
createSkill.nameInvalidChars: Skill name can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
createSkill.nameInvalidHyphens: Skill name cannot start/end with hyphen or contain consecutive hyphens
createSkill.descriptionPlaceholder:
Describe what this skill does and when to use it. This is the primary trigger for the skill.

Example: Search the web and return results. Use this when you need to find current information online, verify facts, or research topics.
createSkill.descriptionHint: Include both what the skill does and when Claude should use it
createSkill.descriptionTooLong: Description must be 1024 characters or less
createSkill.descriptionInvalidChars: Description cannot contain angle brackets (< or >)
createSkill.licenseHint: e.g., MIT, Apache-2.0, or 'Complete terms in LICENSE.txt'
createSkill.successMessage: Your skill "{{name}}" has been created successfully.
createSkill.nextStep1: Edit SKILL.md to complete the TODO items
createSkill.nextStep2: Customize or delete the example files
createSkill.nextStep3: Test your skill with an AI agent

aiEnhance.description: Use AI to help generate or enhance your content
aiEnhance.namePlaceholder: Describe what your skill does in a few words...
aiEnhance.descriptionPlaceholder: Enter a brief description and AI will enhance it...
aiEnhance.contentPlaceholder: Describe what you want this skill to do...
aiEnhance.noProviderHint: Please configure an LLM provider in Settings to use AI features.

exampleSkills.title: Example Skills
exampleSkills.description: Import official example skills from Anthropic to get started quickly. All skills are Apache 2.0 licensed.

aiTools.title: AI Tools Configuration
aiTools.claudeGlobalDesc: Global CLAUDE.md file that applies to all projects
aiTools.claudePlaceholder:
# Claude Code Configuration

## Overview
Describe your project...

## Tech Stack
- Technology 1
- Technology 2

## Standards
Coding conventions...
aiTools.claudeFormatDesc: CLAUDE.md is a Markdown file that provides Claude Code with project context
aiTools.claudeFormatTip1: There is no required format - keep it concise and human-readable.
aiTools.cursorGlobalDesc: Global rules configured in Cursor settings
aiTools.cursorGlobalNote: These rules are managed in Cursor IDE settings
aiTools.cursorPlaceholder:
# Cursor Rules

## Code Style
Define your coding style preferences...

## Project Context
Provide context about the project...
aiTools.cursorMdcDesc: Modern Cursor rules use .mdc files in .cursor/rules/ directory
aiTools.cursorMdcTip1: MDC files use YAML frontmatter followed by markdown content:
aiTools.cursorMdcTip2: Place .mdc files in your project's .cursor/rules/ directory
aiTools.opencodeConfigDesc: Global OpenCode configuration in JSON format
aiTools.opencodePlaceholder:
# Agent Instructions

## Overview
Describe your project...

## Guidelines
Coding guidelines...
aiTools.opencodeCompatTip1: OpenCode supports CLAUDE.md as a fallback if AGENTS.md doesn't exist.
aiTools.opencodeCompatTip2: Configuration files are merged together, not replaced.
aiTools.selectProjectDesc: Choose a project directory to view and edit its AI tool configurations
aiTools.detectedConfigsDesc: AI tool configuration files found in this project
aiTools.noConfigsFound: No AI tool configuration files found in this project
aiTools.createConfigDesc: Create a new configuration file for this project
